expectations.text: Scope mode is detected as 'branch' (comparing current branch against a base branch)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md opens with '**Branch mode** -- The user requested full code review of my branch against main.' Correctly identified branch mode and determined base as initial commit when main branch didn't exist locally.

expectations.text: Changed files list is present in scope-determination.md showing files that differ between master and main
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md contains detailed file list: '328 files changed, ~72,142 lines of insertions across 3 commits' with categorized breakdown into source code (34 files), test code, config, docs, plugin definitions, and research artifacts.

expectations.text: All 6 review types are selected: standard, security, performance, architecture, test-coverage, and silent-failure
expectations.evidence: review-selection.md: 'Selected Reviews: All 6' with a table showing all 6 types selected with 'Default for full review' rationale for each.

expectations.text: Subagent launch was attempted for each of the 6 selected review types
expectations.evidence: orchestration-log.md: 'The Agent tool is not available in this execution context.' No subagents were launched. All 6 reviews were executed sequentially inline by the orchestrating agent. The skill correctly identified this as a limitation and adapted.

expectations.text: A final report file (final-report.md) exists with review findings or a synthesis output
expectations.evidence: final-report.md exists with complete synthesis output: 11 verified findings (2 critical, 4 high, 5 medium), positive observations, summary table, and structured JSON block. Full verification summary with synthesis metadata.
